settings.subtitle: A calmer, cleaner PDP built for the first review pass.
settings.description: Create a credible, premium product narrative here while leaving room for final merchant copy and dynamic metafields.
settings.trust_note: Built to communicate trust before complexity, with room for final product-specific proof.
settings.bullet_1: Premium above the fold without a crowded supplement-store feel.
settings.bullet_2: Dynamic-source ready for subtitle, badges, trust note, and bullets.
settings.bullet_3: Clear quantity framing for 1, 3, and 6 unit selection.
settings.bullet_4: Subscription shell included so the future flow has a visible home.
settings.subscribe_note: UI shell for the future subscription flow

settings.title: What the customer feels first
settings.text: Use this first card to mirror the real concern the product is meant to address in a calm, non-hype way.

settings.title: How the product fits the routine
settings.text: Use this second card to show how the formulation helps and why it belongs in the customer's daily pattern.

settings.heading: Explain the problem, the product role, and the calmer routine it supports
settings.body: This section should bridge the emotional need and the practical product role, giving the customer a reason to keep reading without stuffing the page.

settings.title: Explain the rationale simply
settings.text: Use ingredient or formulation language that feels credible but still easy for a shopper to understand at a glance.

settings.title: Show how the product fits daily life
settings.text: Focus on how this supports a routine customers can imagine themselves maintaining consistently.

settings.title: Support the premium story
settings.text: Use this card to reinforce quality, support, testing, or the specific trust signal that matters most.

settings.heading: Turn the formulation into clear, believable customer benefits
settings.intro: These cards should help the customer understand the product quickly, while staying consistent with the calmer premium direction.

settings.title: Use one strong proof layer
settings.text: Show one concise proof card for testimonials, results language, or category trust without overloading the layout.

settings.title: Support still converts
settings.text: Shipping reliability, customer support, and guarantee clarity can matter as much as the formula itself.

settings.title: Keep the authority human
settings.text: Use this card for the scientific or expert layer that makes the product feel responsibly built, not overmarketed.

settings.heading: Layer in expert reassurance, proof, and customer confidence
settings.intro: This section should feel like the strongest credibility layer on the PDP.
settings.quote: The clearest product pages do not just sell the product. They reduce uncertainty and help the customer feel safe buying it.
settings.check_1: Use this for scientific rationale or formulation clarity.
settings.check_2: Use this for quality, sourcing, or support reassurance.
settings.check_3: Use this for customer confidence or routine fit.

settings.title: Confidence-first guarantee
settings.text: Use a concise, readable risk-reversal message here so customers feel safe moving forward.

settings.title: Clear delivery expectation
settings.text: Use practical shipping and support copy here instead of leaving that reassurance buried in generic theme sections.

settings.title: Simple customer care promise
settings.text: Use this card for the final emotional reassurance layer after proof and product education.

settings.question: How should I use this product?
settings.answer: Use this FAQ for the clearest daily-use instruction or starter guidance available at review time.

settings.question: When should I expect to notice a difference?
settings.answer: Use this FAQ to set practical expectations and reduce hesitation before purchase.

settings.heading: Close with guarantees, support clarity, and the final objections covered
settings.intro: This final section should help the customer feel safe completing the purchase.
